name: Basic Tomato Sauce (Mario)
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons fresh thyme, or 2 tablespoons dried thyme
2 cans tomatoes, 28 ounces each, crushed and mixed with juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until translucent but not brown, about 10 minutes.
2. Add the thyme and carrot. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the tomatoes. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to just below boiling point. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
4. Season with salt to taste. Serve immediately or store in the refrigerator for up to one week or freeze for up to six months.
